paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

raw_extraction.innovation: GODEL introduces a three-phase pre-training pipeline that incorporates grounded dialog data with external knowledge, enabling models to generate responses that are both useful and aligned with user goals
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Reddit comment chains, public dialog data, grounded dialog corpora (MS MARCO, DSTC7, Schema-Guided Dialog, UnifiedQA, Wizard of Wikipedia, Wizard of Internet, MultiWOZ)
raw_extraction.application: Goal-directed dialog, knowledge-grounded response generation, task-oriented conversations, conversational QA
raw_extraction.research_problem: Lack of robust automated evaluation for goal-directed dialog models that incorporate external knowledge
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Grounded dialog generation with external world knowledge
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Few-shot fine-tuning for goal-directed dialog tasks
